textByHashes.74ff58de5f6d94f67fdb3aac06cd29257f12139d: The galley ain't open fer food yet whipper-snapper, ye'll hafta come back later if'n ye be wanting food.
textByHashes.77e89568c61b3a00c2ff73182fb751e13e5c3894: Aye, ter be sure, yer yella-bellied land-lizard!
textByHashes.d57aa5f6cfa1fe3c547b3906883af10bb8b40472: Did we? Ah, sorry ter say but I missed the whole thing, I've bin a mite busy down here in the ole galley.
textByHashes.e7c16a477b11d3211e7116bf07c20656ae4f7b28: Aye, I've felt like that me whole life ter be honest...
textByHashes.52ac7d0b5227ecc7dfa3e0a9a18f4d77046ebb43: Aye, that'll be fer the best whipper-snapper, if'n ye be wanting any food cooked at all.
textByHashes.ee6e35df9cefe4253c8617ffce29443e2c402ea4: Aye, if'n yer say it's true then it must be!
textByHashes.eddd35fe3121333410faad6fbe378e87d7b6e363: yer say? Aye, well I guess that they must be if'n that's what ye're telling me there.
textByHashes.d570c17b8d9c55a7b5e8e8e81e362c1e97ec3032: A jinx yer say? Wassat, some kinda fancy foreign vegetable?
textByHashes.8d63016b89e8f2aec8f293bbb54b5bd8142fbe0f: All vegetables are evil if you ask me!
textByHashes.838f80b37f72ab98a43bd81d006cc2b2ccd44732: That's right then, we'll hear no more about evil foreign vegetables.
textByHashes.86ad52d95c145f09445df4918e61f2cb729aa9e1: Or vegetables at all! Death ter vegetables!
textByHashes.45030b77048155e8592636dbb877f58ca7515c66: Sorry, the galley's closed fer restockings! Yer'll hafta come back later if'n ye be wanting food!
textByHashes.0af1d3b32f93bc31b00da5ff7e1a88bbfc137c92: Wussat? Some kind of alkyhol? If'n it ain't grog, I don't be stocking it!
textByHashes.d2590976b0e826bb6706d451c584cc2220d06bf6: Aye, that yer may, long'n as yer don't mind me carrying on with me restockings while we talk.
textByHashes.0e41f0b13b4fd59ba0c0b0cac293fd1e7204af49: The Moon Clan yer say? Ah, well I dinna know much about them folks, when everyone else went to that there big old feast I stayed aboard the ship...
textByHashes.b97deae370f979d6dcd0913542a1bf093343dc92: I gots ter be honest, I never trust any food I ain't prepared meself!
textByHashes.7b9b729e4e3d13d06f8a33987d043f10666a4603: Ah, it be you agin, what can i do yer for?
textByHashes.9c76a8d68270e5e5e3ac2c15e51fff3b778f3e12: All the pirates cept'n me yer mean?
textByHashes.0f7b3b38da64a8d207b424abafcab03dbea8f2f6: What did yer want ter know abaht it?
textByHashes.1f9c5b7fd4111eff8674bc128cfa2d565e3436bc: Yer wants me ter be telling yers all about a feast I wasnae even at?
textByHashes.a2a7d909377fff98b1c8d433f95560bf97e3e937: I thinks yer need to be laying off of the old alkyhol, mate.
textByHashes.5b0a9e4b9e87bef29f260b835aa0822d57dce788: Ter be honest, I don't remember much of what happened terday, let alone stuff that happened awhiles back
textByHashes.86867e226783c9fe72ab2bb6ef378a29afc42cc6: Aye? Well yer best be speakin' ter him 'bout that then.
textByHashes.e846c1893da78292f39dbe2d305515dda50d1e74: My speciality! What else could I be cooking?
textByHashes.a0623a8a9dbaac079d3f549e24ab944eb0e30504: Boiled shark guts with a hint of rosemary and a dash of squid ink.
